audit_items.proof_trace: All three arithmetic operations round UP: mulDivUp for USD value (L799), mulWadUp for price multiplier application (L799), and mulDivUp for final assetOut conversion (L802), ensuring assetOutAmount >= exact value at every step. Additionally, the priceMultiplier decay uses mulDiv (round down) on the subtracted term (L795), keeping the multiplier higher than exact and further favoring the protocol.
